raw_transcript: I don't get it, Doctor. If the tests are normal, why do I feel like my stomach is tied in knots? One week I can't go to the bathroom at all, and the next I'm running there six times a day with terrible cramping. The bloating is so bad I can't even zip my jeans by five PM.
final_corrected_note: I don't get it, Doctor. If the tests are normal, why do I feel like my stomach is tied in knots? One week I can't go to the bathroom at all, and the next I'm running there six times a day with terrible cramping. The bloating is so bad I can't even zip my jeans by five PM.
